---
title: "Publications"
subtitle: "Selected work from BioMIND faculty and students"
description: "Selected publications across BioMIND's research in BioAI, molecular machine learning, human-centered AI, complex systems, networks, and learning theory."
bibliography: publications.bib
nocite: |
  @*
---

This page lists representative publications from BioMIND faculty and students. The full machine-readable record is maintained in [`publications/publications.bib`](publications.bib). Selected publications below highlight the cluster's flagship contributions across BioAI, molecular ML, human-centered AI, complex systems, and learning theory.

::: {.bm-callout .bm-callout-gold}
**Updating publications.** Add or edit BibTeX records in `publications/publications.bib` and re-render the site. Group entries by adding `keywords:` tags such as `selected`, `recent`, `preprint`, `workshop`, `software`, and one of `bioai`, `molecular-ml`, `human-centered-ai`, `complex-systems`, `learning-theory`. The full reference list renders automatically at the bottom of this page.
:::

## Selected Publications

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[Six Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence Grand Challenges.](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/10447318.2022.2153320)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Ozmen Garibay, O. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*International Journal of Human-Computer Interaction* · 2023]{.bm-pub-venue}

A major international collaboration identifying grand challenges for creating AI technologies that are ethical, fair, human-centered, and beneficial to society.

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Human-Centered AI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Responsible AI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::

*See also: [HCI International 2023 — Six Human-Centered AI Grand Challenges](https://2023.hci.international/Six-Human-Centered-Artificial-Intelligence-Grand-Challenges.html).*
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[AttentionSiteDTI: An Interpretable Graph-Based Model for Drug-Target Interaction Prediction Using NLP Sentence-Level Relation Classification.](https://academic.oup.com/bib/article/23/4/bbac272/6640006)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Yazdani-Jahromi, M.; Yousefi, N.; Tayebi, A.; Ozmen Garibay, O.; Seal, S.; Kolanthai, E.; Neal, C. J.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Briefings in Bioinformatics* · 2022]{.bm-pub-venue}

An interpretable graph-based deep learning model for drug-target interaction prediction that uses protein binding sites and self-attention, inspired by NLP sentence classification.

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Molecular ML]{.bm-pub-tag} [Drug Discovery]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::

*Code: <https://github.com/yazdanimehdi/AttentionSiteDTI>*
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[UnbiasedDTI: Mitigating Real-World Bias of Drug-Target Interaction Prediction by Using Deep Ensemble-Balanced Learning.](https://www.mdpi.com/1420-3049/27/9/2980)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Tayebi, A.; Yousefi, N.; Yazdani-Jahromi, M.; Kolanthai, E.; Neal, C. J.; Seal, S.; Ozmen Garibay, O.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Molecules* · 2022]{.bm-pub-venue}

A deep ensemble learning framework for drug-target interaction prediction designed to mitigate class imbalance and reduce bias in DTI datasets.

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Drug Discovery]{.bm-pub-tag} [Responsible AI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[BoKDiff: Best-of-K Diffusion Alignment for Target-Specific 3D Molecule Generation.](https://academic.oup.com/bioinformaticsadvances/article/5/1/vbaf137/8159881)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Khodabandeh Yalabadi, A.; Yazdani-Jahromi, M.; Ozmen Garibay, O.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Bioinformatics Advances* · 2025]{.bm-pub-venue}

A diffusion-based framework for target-specific 3D molecule generation combining multi-objective optimization, Best-of-K alignment, and Best-of-N sampling for structure-based drug design.

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Molecular Generation]{.bm-pub-tag} [Diffusion Models]{.bm-pub-tag} [Drug Discovery]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::

*Preprint: <https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.15631> · Code: <https://github.com/khodabandeh-ali/BoKDiff.git>*
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[Local Rademacher Complexity-Based Learning Guarantees for Multi-Task Learning.](https://jmlr.org/papers/v19/17-144.html)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Yousefi, N.; Lei, Y.; Kloft, M.; Mollaghasemi, M.; Anagnostopoulos, G.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Journal of Machine Learning Research* · 2018]{.bm-pub-venue}

A theoretical machine learning paper establishing sharp excess risk bounds for multi-task learning using local Rademacher complexity.

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Learning Theory]{.bm-pub-tag} [Multi-Task Learning]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::

*Preprint: <https://arxiv.org/abs/1602.05916>*
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[BindingSite-AugmentedDTA: Enabling a Next-Generation Pipeline for Interpretable Prediction Models in Drug Repurposing.](https://academic.oup.com/bib/article/24/3/bbad136/7140297)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Includes Yousefi, N. and coauthors.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Briefings in Bioinformatics* · 2023]{.bm-pub-venue}

A drug-target affinity and drug-repurposing study focused on binding-site-augmented modeling and interpretable AI-enabled drug discovery.

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Drug Repurposing]{.bm-pub-tag} [Interpretable AI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::

<!-- TODO(faculty-approval): Verify the full author list for BindingSite-AugmentedDTA before public launch. -->
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Future Directions and Applications of Artificial Intelligence.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Garibay, I.; Barham, C.; Abdidizaji, S.; Jayalath, C.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Advances in Artificial Intelligence Applications* · 2025]{.bm-pub-venue}

A chapter on future directions and applications of artificial intelligence.

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Artificial Intelligence]{.bm-pub-tag} [Complex Systems]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-callout}
**Note on Dr. Garibay's publications.** Dr. Ivan Garibay's CV contains a large publication list spanning AI, complex systems, network science, and information dynamics. Selected publications to be updated after faculty review.
:::

## BioAI & Molecular Machine Learning

Flagship outputs from MoML and AI-AIR include:

- **AttentionSiteDTI** — *Briefings in Bioinformatics*, 2022
- **UnbiasedDTI** — *Molecules*, 2022
- **BindingSite-AugmentedDTA** — *Briefings in Bioinformatics*, 2023
- **BoKDiff** — *Bioinformatics Advances*, 2025

See the *Selected Publications* section above for full citations and links.

## Human-Centered and Trustworthy AI

- **Six Human-Centered AI Grand Challenges** — *International Journal of Human-Computer Interaction*, 2023

Additional human-centered and trustworthy AI publications to be added by Human-CAIR.

## Complex Systems, Networks, and Information Dynamics

- **Future Directions and Applications of Artificial Intelligence** — *Advances in Artificial Intelligence Applications*, 2025 (Garibay, I. *et al.*)

::: {.bm-callout}
**Selected complex systems, network science, and information dynamics publications to be updated after faculty review.**
:::

## Learning Theory and Machine Learning

- **Local Rademacher Complexity-Based Learning Guarantees for Multi-Task Learning** — *Journal of Machine Learning Research*, 2018

## Software and Datasets

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[AttentionSiteDTI — code release.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Yazdani-Jahromi, M. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[GitHub · <https://github.com/yazdanimehdi/AttentionSiteDTI>]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Software]{.bm-pub-tag} [Open Source]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[BoKDiff — code release.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Khodabandeh Yalabadi, A. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[GitHub · <https://github.com/khodabandeh-ali/BoKDiff.git>]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Software]{.bm-pub-tag} [Open Source]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

## Student Publications, Posters, and Submissions

Selected publications, posters, and submissions from BioMIND Ph.D. students. Status labels indicate the current stage of each work — published, accepted (oral / poster), submitted, under review, or manuscript in preparation.

### Tasfia Nuzhat

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Medical-GAT: Cancer Document Classification Leveraging Graph-Based Residual Network for Scenarios with Limited Data.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Nuzhat, T. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Scientific Reports*]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Published]{.bm-pub-tag} [Biomedical NLP]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::

<!-- TODO(confirm): Verify final author list and publication year. -->
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[A Review on Machine Learning in Photocatalytic Degradation of Organic Dyes from Wastewater: Current Trends and Future Directions.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Nuzhat, T. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Journal of Water Process Engineering*]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Published]{.bm-pub-tag} [Machine Learning]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::

<!-- TODO(confirm): Verify final author list and publication year. -->
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[MoCDiff: Efficient Motif-Constrained Discrete Diffusion for Molecule Generation.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Nuzhat, T. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[ICML 2026 Workshop on Generative & Agentic AI for Biology]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Submitted]{.bm-pub-tag} [Molecular Generation]{.bm-pub-tag} [Diffusion Models]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[PEFT A2Z: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning Survey for Large Language and Vision Models.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Nuzhat, T. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[Venue · *to be added*]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Under review]{.bm-pub-tag} [Survey]{.bm-pub-tag} [LLMs]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[A Multi-Scale Hyper Representation Network for Semantic Segmentation of Pulmonary Circulation Vessels in Pathology Assessment.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Nuzhat, T. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[IEEE-EMBS IECBES · 2024]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Published]{.bm-pub-tag} [Medical Imaging]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

### Siddhi Kanta Mishra

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[From Graphons to Graphlets: A Graph-Limit Lens on Sparse Neural Connectivity and Training.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Mishra, S. K.; Garibay, I.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[Network Science Informs AI Satellite, NetSci · 2026]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Accepted oral]{.bm-pub-tag} [Graph Limits]{.bm-pub-tag} [Network Science]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Beyond Edge Prediction: Residual Set Modeling for Combinatorial Gene Regulation.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Rahimimovassagh, M.; Mishra, S. K.; Garibay, I.; Yousefi, N.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[Gen2 Workshop at ICLR · 2026]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Accepted poster]{.bm-pub-tag} [Gene Regulation]{.bm-pub-tag} [BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[From Edge Detection to Regulatory Logic Discovery: Residual Set Models for Exact Regulator Recovery in Gene Regulatory Networks.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Mishra, S. K.; Rahimimovassagh, M.; Yousefi, N.; Garibay, I.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[Machine Learning for Genomics Explorations Workshop at ICLR · 2026]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Accepted poster]{.bm-pub-tag} [Gene Regulation]{.bm-pub-tag} [BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Graphon-Based Information Bottleneck Analysis of Neural Networks via Stochastic Block Models.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Mishra, S. K.; Jayalath, C.; Garibay, I.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[NeurIPS 2025 Workshop on Symmetry and Geometry in Neural Representations (NeurReps)]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Submitted]{.bm-pub-tag} [Information Bottleneck]{.bm-pub-tag} [Graph Limits]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[MoCDiff: Efficient Motif-Constrained Discrete Diffusion for Molecule Generation.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Mishra, S. K.; Ornee, T.; Garibay, I.; Yousefi, N.; Basher, J.; Garibay, O.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[Manuscript in preparation]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Manuscript in preparation]{.bm-pub-tag} [Molecular Generation]{.bm-pub-tag} [Diffusion Models]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::

<!-- TODO(confirm): Final author list and target venue. -->
:::

### Mehrdad Shoeibi

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[BioGen: An evidence-grounded framework for interpreting RNA-seq gene clusters in antimicrobial resistance research.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Hossain, E.; Shoeibi, M.; Garibay, I.; Yousefi, N.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[RECOMB-RSG · 2026]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Accepted poster]{.bm-pub-tag} [BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag} [RNA-seq]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Utilizing Generative AI for the Production, Classification, and Annotation of Chronic Wound Images: A Systematic Review.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Shoeibi, M.; Tulu, B.; Agu, E. O.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[AMCIS 2024 TREOs · 193]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Published]{.bm-pub-tag} [Healthcare AI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Generative AI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Learning Reliable Models under Weak Supervision and Distribution Shift.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Shoeibi, M. *and collaborators*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[Ongoing Ph.D. research direction]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Ongoing]{.bm-pub-tag} [Reliable AI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Weak Supervision]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

### Elias Hossain

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[When policies cannot be retrained: A unified closed-form view of post-training steering in offline reinforcement learning.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Hossain, E. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[NeurIPS 2026 Main Track]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Submitted]{.bm-pub-tag} [Reinforcement Learning]{.bm-pub-tag} [LLM Alignment]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[MIRAGE-BIO: A robust inference-time screening system for biomolecular candidate selection under unreliable surrogate evidence.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Hossain, E. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[NeurIPS 2026 Main Track]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Submitted]{.bm-pub-tag} [BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Trustworthy AI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[BioDivergence: A leakage-aware benchmark for contextual biomedical contradiction evaluation.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Hossain, E. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[NeurIPS 2026 Datasets and Benchmarks Track]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Submitted]{.bm-pub-tag} [Benchmark]{.bm-pub-tag} [Biomedical NLP]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Before the gradient: Preference alignment requires verified supervision.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Hossain, E. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[NeurIPS 2026 Position Track]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Submitted]{.bm-pub-tag} [Preference Alignment]{.bm-pub-tag} [Trustworthy AI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Fault-tolerant preference alignment via multi-agent verification.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Hossain, E. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[ICLR Trustworthy AI Workshop]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Published]{.bm-pub-tag} [Multi-Agent Verification]{.bm-pub-tag} [Preference Alignment]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

## Publications to be updated after faculty review

::: {.bm-callout .bm-callout-gold}
Additional selected publications, preprints, workshop papers, and software releases will be added once individual faculty review their lists. The list above reflects the BioMIND beta publication selection only and is not intended to be exhaustive.
:::

## Full reference list

The references below are rendered automatically from `publications/publications.bib`.

::: {#refs}
:::
